results.rendered_html: śīrṣan n. (for śiras + an; rare in later language; Veda has all cases in sg. except nom. acc.; also has nom. acc. du. pl. loc. pl.; later language has only acc. pl. and remaining cases; cf. also a-, tri-, sahasraś˚) the head (also ‘an eminent or illustrious person’, cf.  RV. vii, 18, 24 ),  RV. ; &c.
